holdings.infoBox: SIXH is an equity ETF with a total of 55 individual holdings. The top holdings are Altria Group stock at 5.12%, PepsiCo at 3.81%, Verizon Communications at 3.72%, AT&T Inc. at 3.51%, and State Street® SPDR® S&P 500® ETF at 3.22%.

overview.description: The ETC 6 Meridian Hedged Equity Index Option ETF (SIXH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that provides exposure to US equities and sells call options against SPY. SIXH was launched on May 11, 2020 and is issued by Exchange Traded Concepts.
